steps.title: Map the logical relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1 sets the scene at the Marie Hitchcock Puppet Theater. The blank introduces "they will experience puppetry in its highest form" — describing what audiences experience at that location.

steps.title: Pick the matching transition
steps.content:
"There" simply points back to the place just named — fitting perfectly. "To that end" signals purpose, "However"/"Conversely" signal contrast, none of which match the continuation.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
